email: Hi, I was charged twice for my monthly subscription and need a refund.
expected_summary: Customer reports duplicate subscription charge and requests refund.

email: The app crashes every time I upload a PDF.
expected_summary: Customer reports app crashing during PDF upload.

email: I forgot my password and can't log in.
expected_summary: Customer cannot access account due to forgotten password.

email: Do you offer discounts for students?
expected_summary: Customer asks about student discounts.

email: I canceled last week but was still billed today.
expected_summary: Customer was charged after canceling subscription.

email: Your latest update freezes my screen whenever I open settings.
expected_summary: Customer reports app freezing after latest update.

email: I never received the email verification code.
expected_summary: Customer did not receive email verification code.

email: Can I use your service on multiple devices at the same time?
expected_summary: Customer asks about multi-device usage.

email: Refund pls
expected_summary: Customer requests refund.

email: Amazing update. Now the app crashes before it even opens.
expected_summary: Customer sarcastically reports app crashing on launch.

email: i cant login to my accnt after changing my phone
expected_summary: Customer cannot access account after changing phone.

email: What payment methods do you support?
expected_summary: Customer asks about supported payment methods.

email: I upgraded to premium but the features are still locked.
expected_summary: Customer upgraded account but premium features remain inaccessible.

email: The search feature takes forever to load now.
expected_summary: Customer reports slow search performance.

email: Someone changed my account email without my permission.
expected_summary: Customer reports unauthorized account email change.

email: Do you have a dark mode feature?
expected_summary: Customer asks whether dark mode is available.

email: Why did my invoice amount suddenly increase this month?
expected_summary: Customer questions unexpected invoice increase.

email: Every uploaded image becomes blurry after processing.
expected_summary: Customer reports image quality degradation after upload.

email: My account keeps logging me out every few minutes.
expected_summary: Customer experiences repeated account logouts.

email: Do you provide an API for developers?
expected_summary: Customer asks if developer API is available.

email: I was billed in USD even though my account is set to euros.
expected_summary: Customer reports incorrect billing currency.

email: The mobile app won't open on Android 14.
expected_summary: Customer reports app compatibility issue with Android 14.

email: I accidentally deleted my account. Can it be restored?
expected_summary: Customer asks about restoring deleted account.

email: Is there a yearly subscription option?
expected_summary: Customer asks about annual subscription plans.

email: I requested a refund three weeks ago and still haven't received it.
expected_summary: Customer reports delayed refund processing.

email: The notification system stopped working after yesterday's update.
expected_summary: Customer reports notifications failing after update.

email: I changed my password but the old one still works.
expected_summary: Customer reports password update not applying correctly.

email: Can your software export data to Excel?
expected_summary: Customer asks about Excel export support.

email: No puedo iniciar sesión en mi cuenta.
expected_summary: Customer cannot log into account.

email: Your payment page just spins forever.
expected_summary: Customer reports payment page loading indefinitely.

email: NOBODY IS HELPING ME. I HAVE BEEN WAITING FOR A REFUND FOR A MONTH AND NOTHING.
expected_summary: Customer demands long-overdue refund with frustration.

email: Great job guys. My files are all gone after your amazing update.
expected_summary: Customer reports data loss following an app update.
notes: Sarcasm masking a serious data loss issue.

email: plz help cant log in tried evrything
expected_summary: Customer is unable to log in after exhausting options.

email: Do you support team collaboration features?
expected_summary: Customer inquires about team collaboration functionality.

email: I was charged twice in one day. Also I can't access my dashboard anymore. Please help with both.
expected_summary: Customer reports duplicate charge and dashboard access issue.

email: Mon compte a été suspendu sans raison.
expected_summary: Customer reports account suspended without reason.

email: The export to CSV button does nothing when I click it.
expected_summary: Customer reports non-functional CSV export button.

email: How do I cancel my subscription?
expected_summary: Customer asks how to cancel their subscription.

email: I downgraded my plan but you're still billing me at the premium rate.
expected_summary: Customer reports being billed at old premium rate after downgrade.
notes: Plan downgrade not reflected in billing.

email: Videos won't play on Safari. Tried on Chrome and it works fine.
expected_summary: Customer reports video playback failure specific to Safari.

email: I think someone hacked my account. There are logins from countries I've never been to.
expected_summary: Customer reports suspicious logins suggesting account compromise.

email: refund
expected_summary: Customer requests a refund.

email: I've been a loyal customer for 3 years and this is how you treat me? I was charged for a plan I never signed up for, and when I tried to log in to fix it, my account was locked. I spent two hours on your help page and found nothing useful. This is absolutely unacceptable.
expected_summary: Long-standing customer reports unauthorized charge and account lockout.
notes: Long complaint email with multiple issues and emotional tone.

email: Does your plan include unlimited storage?
expected_summary: Customer asks whether storage is unlimited on current plan.

email: The 2FA code I receive never works.
expected_summary: Customer reports two-factor authentication codes failing.

email: Your app is so optimized it crashed my whole phone. Congrats.
expected_summary: Customer reports app causing device crash.
notes: Sarcastic report of severe app crash.

email: I upgraded but I'm not sure if the payment went through.
expected_summary: Customer is uncertain whether upgrade payment was processed.

email: Nicht in der Lage, mein Passwort zurückzusetzen.
expected_summary: Customer unable to reset password.

email: MY ACCOUNT IS LOCKED AND I HAVE A PRESENTATION IN AN HOUR PLEASE HELP URGENTLY
expected_summary: Customer urgently reports account lockout before a time-sensitive event.
notes: All caps, urgent tone, time pressure.

email: Is there a free trial available?
expected_summary: Customer asks about free trial availability.

email: The drag and drop feature is broken on Windows 11.
expected_summary: Customer reports drag and drop not working on Windows 11.

email: I got charged $99 but I only signed up for the $9 plan. What is going on?
expected_summary: Customer reports being overcharged relative to selected plan.

email: cant remmber my passowrd or the email i used to sign up lol
expected_summary: Customer cannot recover account due to forgotten password and email.
notes: Heavy typos, informal tone, account recovery edge case.

email: I need an invoice for my last payment for tax purposes.
expected_summary: Customer requests invoice for tax documentation.

email: Do you have a desktop app or only web-based?
expected_summary: Customer asks about desktop app availability.

email: My collaborator can see my private files. That shouldn't be possible.
expected_summary: Customer reports collaborator has unauthorized access to private files.

email: The app keeps asking me to log in even though I clicked 'remember me'.
expected_summary: Customer reports persistent login prompts despite using remember me option.

email: I want to switch from monthly to annual billing.
expected_summary: Customer requests switch from monthly to annual billing cycle.

email: no puedo ver mis archivos, todo esta en blanco
expected_summary: Customer reports blank screen with no files visible.

email: I've upgraded my account to premium but my team members still see the free tier. Also I was billed twice this month.
expected_summary: Customer reports premium upgrade not reflecting for team and duplicate charge.

email: SCAM. YOU CHARGED ME WITHOUT PERMISSION.
expected_summary: Customer reports unauthorized charge and accuses service of fraud.

email: How do I add more users to my team plan?
expected_summary: Customer asks how to add team members to their plan.

email: Files I uploaded last week have disappeared. No warning, nothing.
expected_summary: Customer reports previously uploaded files missing without explanation.
notes: Unexpected data loss, no error message.

email: I updated my billing address but invoices still show the old one.
expected_summary: Customer reports invoice address not updating after change.

email: My username was changed and I didn't do it.
expected_summary: Customer reports unauthorized username change.

email: Oh wow, the app runs SO smoothly now. Except for the part where nothing works.
expected_summary: Customer sarcastically reports app being completely non-functional.

email: What's your data retention policy?
expected_summary: Customer asks about data retention practices.

email: I cancelled my account 2 months ago but you're still charging me every month. I've emailed before with no response.
expected_summary: Customer reports ongoing charges after cancellation with no prior support response.

email: The print layout is completely broken. Everything overlaps.
expected_summary: Customer reports broken print layout with overlapping elements.

email: I think I signed up with two different emails. Can you merge the accounts?
expected_summary: Customer requests merging of two accounts created with different emails.

email: help
expected_summary: Customer requests help with no further detail.

email: I'm being billed in a currency that isn't mine and the conversion rate is terrible. Who decided this?
expected_summary: Customer complains about incorrect billing currency and conversion rate.

email: The dark mode you added burns my retinas. Please fix.
expected_summary: Customer reports dark mode causing visual discomfort, requests fix.

email: I can log in on mobile but not on desktop. Same account, same password.
expected_summary: Customer reports login working on mobile but failing on desktop.

email: Do you offer HIPAA-compliant plans?
expected_summary: Customer asks about HIPAA-compliant plan availability.

email: I'm paying for 10 seats but can only activate 7. The rest give an error.
expected_summary: Customer reports paid seats not fully activatable due to errors.
notes: Billing and technical overlap: seats paid but not provisioned.

email: Mein Abonnement wurde ohne Vorwarnung gekündigt.
expected_summary: Customer reports subscription cancelled without notice.

email: The API rate limits are way too low for production use. Is there a higher tier?
expected_summary: Customer inquires about higher API rate limit tiers for production.

email: app crashes whn i try 2 share a file 2 anyone
expected_summary: Customer reports app crashing when attempting to share files.
notes: Typos and shorthand, file sharing crash.

email: I got an email saying my subscription was upgraded but I never requested that. Now I see a higher charge.
expected_summary: Customer reports unsolicited subscription upgrade and unexpected charge.
notes: Potential unauthorized account change with billing impact.

email: Your SSO integration with Google is broken. It redirects to an error page.
expected_summary: Customer reports Google SSO redirecting to error page.

email: Can I transfer my account to someone else?
expected_summary: Customer asks about transferring account ownership.

email: I WAS DOUBLE CHARGED. THIS IS THE THIRD TIME. SORT IT OUT.
expected_summary: Customer reports recurring duplicate charges in frustration.
notes: All caps, repeat billing issue, escalation.

email: Everything was fine until this morning. Now the whole dashboard is just white.
expected_summary: Customer reports dashboard suddenly displaying blank white screen.

email: How long does it take to process a refund?
expected_summary: Customer asks about refund processing time.

email: I changed my email address but now I can't verify the new one and the old one no longer works.
expected_summary: Customer is locked out after email change left account unverifiable.

email: je n'arrive pas à télécharger mes fichiers, ça tourne sans arrêt
expected_summary: Customer reports file download spinning indefinitely.
notes: French language, infinite spinner on download.

email: I've been charged the team plan rate but I'm a solo user. I only chose individual.
expected_summary: Customer reports being billed for team plan instead of individual plan.

email: Notifications are coming 3–4 hours late. Makes them completely useless.
expected_summary: Customer reports significant notification delivery delay.

email: I have two separate issues. First, I need a refund for last month. Second, my password reset email never arrives.
expected_summary: Customer requests refund and reports missing password reset emails.

email: What's the difference between the Pro and Business plans?
expected_summary: Customer asks for comparison between Pro and Business plan tiers.

email: My wohle team cant login sinse yesterday, nothing works
expected_summary: Customer reports entire team unable to log in since yesterday.

email: The app is great. Ten out of ten. Except the part where it deleted all my projects.
expected_summary: Customer reports all projects deleted, framed sarcastically.
notes: Sarcastic framing of critical data loss.

email: I need to update my credit card on file. Where do I do that?
expected_summary: Customer asks how to update stored payment card details.

email: On my laptop it works. On my PC it doesn't open. Both Windows 11.
expected_summary: Customer reports app not opening on one of two Windows 11 devices.

email: I was offered a 20% discount by your sales team but it wasn't applied to my invoice.
expected_summary: Customer reports promised discount not applied to invoice.
notes: Sales promise not reflected in billing.

email: no se puede cambiar el idioma en la app, siempre vuelve al inglés
expected_summary: Customer reports app language setting always reverting to English.

email: Someone is logged into my account right now and I can see them moving things. Please help immediately.
expected_summary: Customer reports active unauthorized access to account in real time.

email: I signed up for the free plan but I'm seeing a charge on my card. I never entered my card details.
expected_summary: Customer reports unexpected charge despite signing up for free plan.
notes: Ambiguous billing on free tier, possible fraud concern.

email: I've been using your product for two years and I have to say — this month has been a disaster. The app crashes on startup, I got charged twice, my password reset isn't working, and when I finally reached your chat support they disconnected me. I'm seriously reconsidering my subscription.
expected_summary: Long-term customer reports app crash, duplicate charge, broken password reset, and poor support experience.
notes: Long multi-issue complaint: technical + billing + account + support failure.
